description: Baseline router features using the raw base model (no BC or DPO training). Each record contains a 15-dim feature vector and verifier scores for one step in a trajectory.

schema.step_idx: int — 0-based step index within the episode
schema.features: list[float] — 15-dimensional router feature vector (verifier signal, entropy, log-prob, consistency, spread, etc.)
schema.slm_success: float — heuristic verifier score for the SLM's chosen action (0.0 = fail, 1.0 = pass)
schema.cost: float — routing cost signal (higher = more expensive to route to LLM)

theory_checks.note: Base model with no training — theory checks indicate weak signal as expected
theory_checks.entropy_check: FAIL (base model assigns similar entropy to correct and incorrect steps)

textworld_noisy_router_features_heuristi.gpu: 4x Quadro RTX 8000 (45GB each), shards 0-3 on GPUs 2,3,4,7

theory_checks.note: Base model baseline — 4/5 theory checks passing
